---
title: RDM Tools
categories: [Research Software]
---

The Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam hosts a wide range of research data management (RDM) tools designed for researchers to support researchers throughout their enitre project lifecycle. 

Whether you are starting your data management plan, collecting data or looking for long-term storage solutions, RDM tools help you optimize your research process and make data handling efficient. 

Not sure which tools fits your project? The [RDM Support Desk](mailto:rdm.vu.nl) is availible to provide you with the guidance throughout your entire project ligecycle.
